content.text:
The tool call failed with an error: "Command killed with signal SIGTERM. Command failed: mw user ssh-key create --expires 30d --output mcp-test-key --no-passphrase --comment test key --quiet --token [REDACTED]".

This suggests there may be an issue with the SSH key creation command itself. Let me check the logs for more details:
